hypothesis: Log attempted solutions as rule pairings before exec
expected_outcome: All exec attempts have a prior rule log entry. Failed execs are documented, not lost.

hypothesis: tools.exec.host=gateway survives restart but session runtime does not pick it up mid-session
expected_outcome: New sessions after config patch will have gateway exec. Existing main session requires restart to pick up new exec host.

hypothesis: Truncating cache key to YYYY-MM reduces churn to <50% on synthetic test data
failure_mode: CORRECTNESS VIOLATION: YYYY-MM truncation causes cache collisions across different dates in same month. DST transitions within a month mean Mar 1 14:00 EST and Mar 10 14:00 EST are different UTC offsets. Cache hit returns wrong result. Metric passed, invariant broken.

hypothesis: A passing test metric does not validate correctness invariants. Cache optimization must preserve: same input = same output AND different inputs that produce different outputs must not collide.
expected_outcome: Test suite must include correctness validation, not just churn/accuracy rate
